suppress.notes: False positive: these CVEs affect non-Java OpenTelemetry packages, but dependency-check can associate them with Java OpenTelemetry Maven artifacts via shared project evidence.
False positive: these CVEs affect OpenTelemetry Go/Python packages; keep this scoped to OpenTelemetry package URLs rather than suppressing the CVEs globally.
False positive: dependency-check associates OpenTelemetry Go/Python CVEs with Prometheus simpleclient_tracer_otel_agent by name evidence. The affected CVEs do not describe this Java Maven artifact.
False positive: PURL-scoped variant for Prometheus simpleclient_tracer_otel_agent OpenTelemetry Go/Python CVE name-evidence matches.
False positive: CVE-2026-42582 is specific to Netty HTTP/3 QpackDecoder. This project resolves Netty 4.1.x artifacts and does not include netty-codec-http3.
False positive: CVE-2026-42582 is specific to Netty HTTP/3 QpackDecoder. This packageUrl variant handles dependency-check evidence that resolves by PURL.
